name_cn:
[Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock Red
Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Paris's new motorcycle bag reshapes the classic bag shape, injecting new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Made of top-tier Italian imported cracked leather, retaining the original DNA of the classic motorcycle bag with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and tassel zippers, while adding adjustable woven straps and cute playful heart-shaped mirrors, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament 👍🏻, 🧐 Retro trend is back, the favorite of fashionistas 👄
Dimensions: 38*17*24cm
